implementation_summary: Fixed the business-class seat-type mapping so columns A/D are classified as window seats and B/C as aisle seats in `_seat_type_for`. This is a localized backend change in `backend/app/db/seat_inventory.py` that corrects window-preference assignment behavior for business class without altering other cabin mappings.
commit_message: Fix business-class seat-type mapping for window preferences

changes.change_summary: Corrected business cabin seat-type mapping so A/D are window seats and B/C are aisle seats.
changes.rationale: This directly fixes the classification bug described in the issue while keeping all other cabin logic unchanged.

validation_notes: No tests were added because only the repository file contents provided were available; the requested change is limited to the business-class mapping fix.
Recommended validation: run targeted backend tests for seat inventory classification and business-class window-preference assignment.
assumptions: `_seat_type_for` is the only needed code path for correcting the business-class seat classification bug.
The repository's test files were not included in the provided file set, so the patch is limited to the identified implementation file only.
